title: satureja calamintha var. glandulosa
intro: Satureja calamintha var. glandulosa, also known as Spanish mountain mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family, Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Spanish mountain mint include relief from digestive issues, colds, and flu, as well as its potential to reduce stress and improve respiratory function. Spanish mountain mint can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, making it a versatile and useful addition to natural remedies.
